name: rule-system
description: Project-level SQLite rule library with module enums and current-session rule selection workflows for Codex projects.

interface.shortDescription: Manage modular project rules and session selections.
interface.longDescription: Rule System packages a project-level SQLite rule library with module enums, current-session selection management, rule display policy, and context capture without mixing rules into long-term memory.
defaultPrompt: Manage project-level rules without long-term memory.
Select project rules for this session.
Capture explicit requirements as atomic rules.
